## Checklist

- [ ] Feature branch created from `main`
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
- [ ] New tools registered in `register.ts` and `index.ts`
